misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 Got same vibe...
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 Got same vibe...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1181 "Luffy: *NGGGHHHH!!!!* *More!* *I need to eat more!!* *Its the first time I've felt something like this!* *Dammit... it's heavy and painful!!* *What's with that guy's Haki?!* *I need to
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1181 "Luffy: *NGGGHHHH!!!!* *More!* *I need to eat more!!* *Its the first time I've felt something like this!* *Dammit... it's heavy and painful!!* *What's with that guy's Haki?!* *I need to eat or I can't win!!!* *More! More!*" First time I see Luffy acting like this😭 The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) #ONEPIECE1181 - FULL ENGLISH TRANSLATION - PART 3 (FINAL PART) Loki: I don't give a damn! I won't be ruled by anyone! Imu: “Domination” itself… is what brings happiness to the world…!! Right...? *Imu screams and lets out a burst of CoC Haki* Imu: RIGHT?! JOYBOOOOOY!!! *Cut to Walrus School. We see Luffy is still eating, LOL. He’s eating so much and talking with his mouth full. He senses the burst of Conqueror’s Haki from Imu.* Luffy: *NGGGHHHH!!!!* *More!* *I need to eat more!!* *Its the first time I've felt something like this!* *Dammit... it's heavy and painful!!* *What's with that guy's Haki?!* *I need to eat or I can't win!!!* *More! More!* Loki: Deep in your thoughts?! WELL YOU'RE... UNDERESTIMATING ME TOO MUCH!!! *Loki hits Imu with Ragnir with such tremendous force, sending him flying and crashing into the Yggdrasil Tree.* Imu: Urgh... *Cough* *Imu sees Loki in the distance transform into Nidhöggr.* Imu: *Nidhöggr!!* *Loki prepares to fire his lightning breath. Imu protects himself with OMEN flames.* Loki: THORHEIM!!! (雷界 = Thunder World) *Imu was protected by the OMEN flames. He smiles." Imu: *So, you've returned...* End Note: A fearless smile... END OF CHAPTER — https://nitter.net/TheWillOfMarco/status/2047388083654701565#m
